entity.country_or_origin: Hyperliquid, Polygon, and Robinhood Chain ecosystems
entity.summary: Integrated decentralized trading interface combining Hyperliquid perpetual trading, protocol-deployed markets, prediction-market access, spot exchange activity, and curve-based token launch and graduation through the Based platform.
entity.notes: Based App, Based Alpha, HYENA, and Based Predict are represented as products of one Based trading-platform identity rather than separate exchange records. Current independent metrics report substantial live perpetual, spot, fee, revenue, and open-interest activity. Confidence is medium because the platform combines exchange, launchpad, prediction, and spending interfaces and detailed first-party documentation was not confirmed in this review pass. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Based official application
evidence.notes: The current dedicated first-party Based application endpoint remains reachable and presents the active platform identity.

evidence.title: Based trading-platform metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent protocol information identifies Based as a Hyperliquid- and Polymarket-connected trading platform and reports non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual, spot, notional, fee, revenue, and open-interest activity.
